title: apollo THE HOUSEWARES BRAND Chrome Trivet CROSS, Heat Resistant, For Saucepans, Pots, Pans, Plates, Size: 20x20x1.6cm, Chrome
features: KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: This stylish yet robust trivet will protect your surfaces from those hot pots and pans.
DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from a high-quality triple chromium-plated wire for a long-lasting shine.
HIGH-QUALITY DESIGN: Extremely strong and durable product that will last you a long time.
SIMPLE TO CLEAN: wipe the surface with a damp cloth or run it under warm water. Not dishwasher-safe in order to preserve the quality of the product.
This product comes assembled and READY TO USE.
